节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: If floating ball enabled in current device.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } true if floating ball enabled, otherwise false.
节点.return_description: true if floating ball enabled, otherwise false.

节点.功能描述: Create floating ball controller The config must be valid, the context in config should not be null. Failed to call the API due to limited device capabilities.
注释信息: @param { FloatingBallConfiguration } config - Params for floating ball controller creation.
@returns { Promise<FloatingBallController> } - The promise returned by the function.
@throws { BusinessError } 1300019 - Wrong parameters for operating the floating ball.

parameters.说明: Params for floating ball controller creation.

节点.return_description: - The promise returned by the function.

error_codes.description: Capability not supported.
Wrong parameters for operating the floating ball.
Floating ball internal error.

注释信息: @param { FloatingBallParams } params - Params for floating ball start.
@returns { Promise<void> } - The promise returned by the function.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed, usually returned by VerifyAccessToken.
@throws { BusinessError } 1300019 - Wrong parameters for operating the floating ball.
@throws { BusinessError } 1300020 - Failed to create the floating ball window.
@throws { BusinessError } 1300021 - Failed to start multiple floating ball windows.
@throws { BusinessError } 1300024 - The floating ball window state is abnormal.
@throws { BusinessError } 1300025 - The floating ball state does not support this operation.
节点.return_description: - The promise returned by the function.

error_codes.description: Permission verification failed, usually returned by VerifyAccessToken.

Failed to start multiple floating ball windows.

注释信息: @param { FloatingBallParams } params - Params for floating ball update.
